basis: tests/runtime-d071-toollauncher-live.test.js deletes the isolated child clone and temporary state root in finally
the claimed child commit is absent from both the ToolLauncher and Meta-Harness object stores after cleanup
the claimed refs/meta-harness/attempts ref is absent after cleanup
the tracked closure envelope contains hashes only; the hashed AO metadata, artifact, schema, journal, assessment, and receipt are not retained
the local live envelope records authorizationReceiptDigest as null; the tracked envelope substitutes authorizationRequestDigest

executeAttempt authorizes from newly collected readiness before inspecting stored attempts; readiness.inspectedAt changes its digest, so a later controller derives a different authorization-request digest and cannot locate the original attempt through the normal path
terminal completion is supposed to survive later authorization expiry, but no private stored-receipt terminal replay path exists before reauthorization

controller construction eagerly binds and probes Codex plus the validation executable/script before any replay classification, so retained terminal truth still depends on current execution-tool availability and hashes
the validator always invokes the subject with -StartupPath and therefore does not prove the parameter is optional or the default path branch works
nextGate: persistent child result custody, stable stored-receipt terminal lookup, and independently replayable evidence before R1A
